creator: jaap@NLnetLabs.nl
text:
The proper functioning depends on the version of OpenSSL, it needs to be OpenSSL 1.1.x at least. That one is in the Windows package as provided by NLnetLabs.

I don't know what is in the FreeBSD package but you can find out. Calling unbound -h will inform you what is used.

OpenSSL 1.1.x is available for FreeBSD as openssl-devel. (This is set in /etc/make.conf as DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=ssl=openssl-devel in case one builds it from the ports).

Hope this helps,

        jaap
